# uptimekuma_notification_yzj (Resource)

YZJ notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_yzj" "example" {
  name        = "YZJ Notifications"
  webhook_url = "https://yzj.example.com/webhook/your-webhook"
  token       = "your-yzj-token"
  is_active   = true
  is_default  = false
}

resource "uptimekuma_notification_yzj" "alerts" {
  name        = "YZJ Alerts"
  webhook_url = "https://yzj.example.com/webhook/alerts"
  token       = "your-yzj-alert-token"
  is_active   = true
  is_default  = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `token` (String, Sensitive) YZJ authentication token
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) YZJ webhook URL endpoint

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
